keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal! Bahamas 0, Costa Rica 1. Alonso Martínez (Costa Rica) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Manfred Ugalde with a through ball.
Nicolás López (Bahamas) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Bahamas 0, Costa Rica 2. Joseph Mora (Costa Rica) left footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Alejandro Bran following a corner.
Goal! Bahamas 0, Costa Rica 3. Alejandro Bran (Costa Rica) from a free kick with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Substitution, Costa Rica. Andy Rojas replaces Kenay Myrie.
Substitution, Costa Rica. Cristopher Núñez replaces Alejandro Bran.
Second Half begins Bahamas 0, Costa Rica 3.
Goal! Bahamas 0, Costa Rica 4. Orlando Galo (Costa Rica) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Alonso Martínez following a corner.
Goal! Bahamas 0, Costa Rica 5. Manfred Ugalde (Costa Rica) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Alonso Martínez.
Substitution, Bahamas. Lance Carroll replaces William Bayles.
Substitution, Costa Rica. Warren Madrigal replaces Alonso Martínez.
Substitution, Costa Rica. Ariel Lassiter replaces Joseph Mora.
Goal! Bahamas 0, Costa Rica 6. Warren Madrigal (Costa Rica) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner.
Substitution, Bahamas. Lamond Cross replaces Reuben Edgecombe.
Substitution, Bahamas. Omar Chemaly replaces Nicolás López.
Substitution, Costa Rica. Álvaro Zamora replaces Manfred Ugalde.
Goal! Bahamas 0, Costa Rica 7. Warren Madrigal (Costa Rica) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Josimar Alcócer.
Substitution, Bahamas. Atarri Moss replaces Lothario Milfrise.
Substitution, Bahamas. Joshua Anton replaces Jonathan Miller.
Goal! Bahamas 0, Costa Rica 8. Álvaro Zamora (Costa Rica) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner.
Second Half ends, Bahamas 0, Costa Rica 8.
